releaseNotes: Added Movement Tool to turn Text, an Image, or selected Segments into moving discs joined by rigid joints.
Added Movement Tool Slide and Spin motions, including spinning a shape in place like a ball.
Added automatic speed/damping calculation in the Movement Tool from the stop point you click.
Added in-editor movement simulation preview with Play, Pause and Reset to watch slide and spin without exporting to HaxBall.
Added new Joint tool to connect two discs with Ctrl+J.
Added Spanish and Polish language support (now English, Turkce, Espanol and Polski).
Added automatic first-launch language selection based on the Windows display language.
Added Export Map as PNG image from the File menu.
Added more validation checks for missing goals/spawns, unused vertexes, duplicate segments and stray far-away objects.
Improved localization coverage across dialogs, panels, popups and status bar messages in all languages.
Improved OpenGL rendering with batched vertex arrays for better performance.
Improved Direct2D rendering to auto-recover from device loss instead of freezing.
Improved movement simulation drawing for smoother, lighter playback.
Improved the Renderer Benchmark panel with a more modern layout.
Added What's New in v1.6.0 popup that appears automatically only once.
Updated HaxStudio UI version labels and installer to 1.6.0.
Updated current focus to publishing the web version.
